title: Nanbanai Paartha Song Lyrics Ninaithale Inikkum
stanzas:
ennuyir vazhum
kaalamellaam avan ninaivu
thudikkum en irudhayathil

ulagathil pidithadhu
edhuvendru ennai kaettaal
en kalloori vazhakaiyai
kaattidume.

ennuyir vazhum
kaalamellaam avan ninaivu
thudikkum en irudhayathil

siragu illai vaanam illai
verum tharaiyil naangal
parappom.

kavalai illai kavanam illai
naangal kadavulukke
varam koduppom.

sumaigal endru yaedhum illai
ingu jaadhi madhangalai
marappom.

mazhai thoovum veyil neram
adhai pole manadhu.
malar pole thadumaarum
vayadhu..

thudikkum en irudhayathil

seo.title: Nanbanai Paartha Song Lyrics Ninaithale Inikkum
seo.description: Full Nanbanai Paartha songs lyrics, Ninaithale Inikkum Songs Lyrics. sharable lyrics snippets, Lyrics: Annamalai, Music: Vijay Antony, Singer(s): Benny Dayal.
seo.keywords: Annamalai, Ninaithale Inikkum, Vijay Antony, Benny Dayal, Nanbanai Paartha full lyrics, Ninaithale Inikkum songs lyrics, Nanbanai Paartha lyrics snippets, Nanbanai Paartha WhatsApp status lyrics snippets, share Nanbanai Paartha lyrics snippets with friends, Tamil lyrics, Tamil songs

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

Nanbanai Paartha conveys deep emotions of love and nostalgia, reflecting on cherished memories and connections.

What is the context of this song in the movie?

In Ninaithale Inikkum, the song plays during a pivotal moment that highlights the bond between friends and the memories they share.

Who is the singer and music director of this song?

The song is sung by Benny Dayal and composed by Vijay Antony.

When was the song released?

Nanbanai Paartha was released on September 4, 2009.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Nanbanai Paartha, the protagonist reflects on the beauty of friendship and love, evoking a sense of nostalgia. The soothing melody, composed by Vijay Antony, perfectly complements the heartfelt lyrics penned by Annamalai. This song encapsulates the emotions tied to cherished memories, making it a timeless piece for romantic occasions. As Benny Dayal's voice resonates, listeners are transported to a world of warmth and affection.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Nanbanai Paartha from Ninaithale Inikkum is a mesmerizing melody that captures the essence of love and nostalgia. With Benny Dayal's soulful vocals and Vijay Antony's enchanting composition, this song resonates deeply with anyone who has cherished memories of friendship and love. Dive into the heartfelt lyrics and let the emotions sweep you away.
stanzaMeanings: I have only remembered my friend in my thoughts.
In my heart, his memory will always live throughout my life.
If you ask me what is held in this world, it will show my school life.
In my next life, I will not forget this place.
I have only remembered my friend in my thoughts.
In my heart, his memory will always live throughout my life.
Without wings, without the sky, we will just spread on the ground.
This youth is a beautiful moment, we will enjoy it without any regrets.
There is no worry, no fear, we will give blessings to the divine.
Whether it is a storm or heavy rain, our hearts will keep moving forward.
The coming time will be ours, we will work hard without resting.
We will gather dreams in our hearts every day in different ways.
In this time of fear, we will complete everything we think of.
There are no worries here, we will forget the differences between communities.
We will remove the divisions between men and women.
The rain will fall and the sun will shine, just like the heart. Flowers will bloom in the same way.
I have only remembered my friend in my thoughts.
In my heart, his memory will always live throughout my life.
If you ask me what is held in this world, it will show my school life.
In my next life, I will not forget this place.
